markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Brainstorm and strategize on enhancing Webflow's marketplace with AI-generated templates and improved discoverability](https://fathom.video/share/MJJeVktFQzaCQ7Qsw85E6FodZtSN8Sci?tab=summary&timestamp=4.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX proposes creating an enriched, SEO-friendly marketplace with easily remixable templates](https://fathom.video/share/MJJeVktFQzaCQ7Qsw85E6FodZtSN8Sci?tab=summary&timestamp=328.0)
  - [Webflow's CodeGen product (launching in October) presents opportunities for AI-generated starter kits](https://fathom.video/share/MJJeVktFQzaCQ7Qsw85E6FodZtSN8Sci?tab=summary&timestamp=1189.0)
  - [Current challenges: no API access, inability to clone/duplicate sandboxes, and differing tech stacks between Webflow and CodeGen](https://fathom.video/share/MJJeVktFQzaCQ7Qsw85E6FodZtSN8Sci?tab=summary&timestamp=1831.0)
  - [Next steps involve deep-dive sessions with Webflow PMs to align on possibilities and constraints](https://fathom.video/share/MJJeVktFQzaCQ7Qsw85E6FodZtSN8Sci?tab=summary&timestamp=2151.0)

## Topics

### GrowthX's Marketplace Vision

  - [Inspired by Mobin, Dribbble, and Notion templates](https://fathom.video/share/MJJeVktFQzaCQ7Qsw85E6FodZtSN8Sci?tab=summary&timestamp=328.0)
  - [Focus on easy navigation, remixing, and SEO-friendly descriptions](https://fathom.video/share/MJJeVktFQzaCQ7Qsw85E6FodZtSN8Sci?tab=summary&timestamp=416.0)
  - [Aim to create a curated experience with high-quality starter kits](https://fathom.video/share/MJJeVktFQzaCQ7Qsw85E6FodZtSN8Sci?tab=summary&timestamp=466.0)
  - [Potential to incorporate user-generated content later, following Notion's model](https://fathom.video/share/MJJeVktFQzaCQ7Qsw85E6FodZtSN8Sci?tab=summary&timestamp=840.0)

### Webflow's Current Situation and Goals

  - [Marketplace is "a mess" with mixed Webflow and coded elements](https://fathom.video/share/MJJeVktFQzaCQ7Qsw85E6FodZtSN8Sci?tab=summary&timestamp=930.0)
  - [Launching private beta of CodeGen product in October](https://fathom.video/share/MJJeVktFQzaCQ7Qsw85E6FodZtSN8Sci?tab=summary&timestamp=1189.0)
  - [Targeting freelancers and agencies, focusing on practical integrations](https://fathom.video/share/MJJeVktFQzaCQ7Qsw85E6FodZtSN8Sci?tab=summary&timestamp=1083.0)
  - [Aiming for a showcase of remixable/clonable templates contributed by Webflow creators](https://fathom.video/share/MJJeVktFQzaCQ7Qsw85E6FodZtSN8Sci?tab=summary&timestamp=1216.0)

### Technical Challenges and Considerations

  - [Webflow templates use internal language, not easily translatable to HTML/CSS](https://fathom.video/share/MJJeVktFQzaCQ7Qsw85E6FodZtSN8Sci?tab=summary&timestamp=1831.0)
  - [CodeGen works better with Tailwind, creating a disconnect with existing Webflow templates](https://fathom.video/share/MJJeVktFQzaCQ7Qsw85E6FodZtSN8Sci?tab=summary&timestamp=1841.0)
  - [No current API access for CodeGen, limiting automation possibilities](https://fathom.video/share/MJJeVktFQzaCQ7Qsw85E6FodZtSN8Sci?tab=summary&timestamp=1585.0)
  - [Need to respect community promises regarding template usage](https://fathom.video/share/MJJeVktFQzaCQ7Qsw85E6FodZtSN8Sci?tab=summary&timestamp=1860.0)

### Proposed Strategy and Next Steps

  - [GrowthX suggests an 8-week strategy sprint to dive deep into possibilities](https://fathom.video/share/MJJeVktFQzaCQ7Qsw85E6FodZtSN8Sci?tab=summary&timestamp=1987.0)
  - [Need for product deep-dive on CodeGen to understand capabilities and limitations](https://fathom.video/share/MJJeVktFQzaCQ7Qsw85E6FodZtSN8Sci?tab=summary&timestamp=2151.0)
  - [Explore potential to translate Webflow's internal language to a format usable by GrowthX's systems](https://fathom.video/share/MJJeVktFQzaCQ7Qsw85E6FodZtSN8Sci?tab=summary&timestamp=1895.0)
  - [Consider phased approach: start with static websites, then translate to Webflow-ready templates](https://fathom.video/share/MJJeVktFQzaCQ7Qsw85E6FodZtSN8Sci?tab=summary&timestamp=1934.0)

### Market Positioning and Competition

  - [Lovable's upcoming features (easy database and AI service connections) seen as potential threat to Webflow](https://fathom.video/share/MJJeVktFQzaCQ7Qsw85E6FodZtSN8Sci?tab=summary&timestamp=2401.0)
  - [Opportunity for Webflow to get ahead by integrating similar features](https://fathom.video/share/MJJeVktFQzaCQ7Qsw85E6FodZtSN8Sci?tab=summary&timestamp=2427.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Kirat to arrange deep-dive sessions with Webflow PMs (CodeGen and Marketplace)](https://fathom.video/share/MJJeVktFQzaCQ7Qsw85E6FodZtSN8Sci?tab=summary&timestamp=2151.0)
  - [GrowthX to send a proposal for a strategy sprint, including budget details](https://fathom.video/share/MJJeVktFQzaCQ7Qsw85E6FodZtSN8Sci?tab=summary&timestamp=2107.0)
  - [Explore possibilities of accessing Webflow's template source code or internal language](https://fathom.video/share/MJJeVktFQzaCQ7Qsw85E6FodZtSN8Sci?tab=summary&timestamp=1895.0)
  - [Rachel to review budget proposal and discuss with CFO](https://fathom.video/share/MJJeVktFQzaCQ7Qsw85E6FodZtSN8Sci?tab=summary&timestamp=2026.0)
  - [Schedule follow-up meeting with expanded team to move the project forward](https://fathom.video/share/MJJeVktFQzaCQ7Qsw85E6FodZtSN8Sci?tab=summary&timestamp=2472.0)
